podcasts.name: Davie Fogarty
podcasts.title: This stranger already owned her product
podcasts.transcript: See you in a minute. You can do it. I'm so nervous for it. [laughter] I hate doing this stuff. >> Oh, through the big puddles. >> If you turn around, you can get this guy coming the other way. >> Yep, I see him. >> You can do it. You can [laughter] do it. Go go go go. >> Good morning. >> How are you? >> Just scoffed and kept riding. >> You got to say, can I just ask you a quick question? You can't say hello, good morning, cuz that's just the greeting. Everyone's going to say, "Hello, good morning." Just keep going. >> It feels weird to do it any other way. >> I know. I know. It's uncomfortable, but that's why it's going to work. [laughter] >> Your natural thing is to say hello. You can't say hello. Remove that from your vocabulary. >> Oh crap. Oh crap. Hey, can I ask you a question? >> I found one. That's good. Hang on. Round. Hey, can I ask you a question? >> Okay. >> Have you heard of um Snacket before? >> I own a Snacket. >> You own a Snacket. You do. >> You're a customer. [laughter] That's awesome. What do you put in your Snacket? I like to put some little uh jelly lollies or cut a few snakes out and just put a little bit of sugar in there so they don't all stick together. >> Oh yeah, that's my two. >> That's a That's a good hack. >> So give her a free snack and say you're the founder. >> Well, I'm I'm the founder of Snacket. I'm Carla. This is the Aqua version. >> That was great. >> Winning. >> Did you click record? >> Wait, does the blue light mean [laughter] No. Yeah, it's definitely recording. It's been flashing the whole time.
